description: Transitive $ref chain exceeds depth 8 (or total $ref count exceeds 256). SDK MUST bound both depth and breadth before resolution.

setup.response_body_summary: Schema with $ref chain a -> b -> c -> d -> e -> f -> g -> h -> i (9 deep)

rationale: Depth <= 8 AND $ref count <= 256 across the resolved tree. Depth 8 with breadth 100 per level is 10^16 nodes — depth alone isn't enough.
